text.title: Objection FAQ Library Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: insufficient signal; collect 10+ lost-deal artifacts first
FAQ library not actionable at speed

branch.when: lost_deal_artifacts >= 10 AND sales_cycle_days >= 7 AND curator_named == false

conclusion.verdict: name curator before build; library without curator decays

branch.when: lost_deal_artifacts >= 10 AND sales_cycle_days >= 7 AND curator_named == true

conclusion.verdict: mine top 10-15 objections; draft evidence-backed rebuttals + 2 copy variants per entry

example.trace: lost_deal_artifacts >= 10 AND sales_cycle_days >= 7 AND curator_named == true → conclusion ref="objection-mined-not-invented" verdict="mine top 10-15 objections; draft evidence-backed rebuttals + 2 copy variants per entry"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
